reason: App implements read-only permission reference (matrix, catalogs, stat tiles) but omits the full member management UI (members table, role/permission editor drawer, bulk actions, audit log, tabbed interface).
keyFunctionalSections: Page header with title and Add member button
Members tab with searchable directory table
Permission matrix (8 permissions × 4 roles with glyphs)
Member editor drawer (right sheet) for role change and permission toggles
Bulk member selection and actions bar
Multiple reference UI states (error, empty, skeleton, access-gated views)
missingSections: Member row selection and bulk actions bar
Member editor drawer (role dropdown, permission toggles, suspend/reactivate buttons)
Tabbed interface between Members and Roles & Permissions views
Confirmation dialogs for role change and membership suspension
Recent access changes audit log on Roles & Permissions tab
Toolbar with role filter, status filter, and export
Self-lockout guard for current admin user
implementedSections: Membership search field with member results
Permission matrix with glyphs and legend
Teacher and Staff permission accordion lists
notes: The app is a read-only reference view of the design spec. It serves permission education (show what each role can do) rather than permission management (assign roles and permissions to members). Full implementation would require wiring the drawer editor, confirmation dialogs, bulk bar, audit log queries, and member DataTable with filters/pagination.
